DL.REDG: Wide 9-tech contain, prevent rollout, rush lanes

LB.SAM: Weak side hook zone, pattern match crossers, collision routes
LB.MIKE: Strong A-gap run fit, drop to hook zone depth 12-15 yards
LB.WILL: Strong side hook zone, robber coverage, watch intermediate

DB.CB1: Left deep third coverage, no underneath help, prevent over-top
DB.CB2: Right deep third coverage, match vertical routes, prevent fade
DB.SLCB: Slot coverage, pattern match, prevent quick slants and digs
DB.SS: Right deep third safety, help over slot receiver, prevent seam
DB.FS: Center field deep third, quarters coverage on #1 receivers
DB.SS2: Left deep third safety, provide help over outside receiver

pre_snap_tells.safety_depth: Deep - both safeties 18+ yards, dead giveaway for prevent
pre_snap_tells.corner_technique: Off coverage, 8-10 yard cushion, protection against deep
pre_snap_tells.linebacker_alignment: Spread wide, intermediate zone drops, run fit secondary
pre_snap_tells.edge_alignment: Wide 9-tech, contain first, pass rush second priority

front_structure.dl_alignment: Odd front, nose tackle on center, ends wide
front_structure.gap_responsibilities: DT has A-gaps, ends have contain, LBs clean up
front_structure.pressure_scheme: 3-man contain rush, no stunts, maintain pocket

coverage_details.deep_defenders: 3 deep defenders - FS center, SS left and right thirds
coverage_details.underneath_zones: 3 hook zones by linebackers, collision coverage underneath
coverage_details.man_assignments: Zone coverage, no pure man assignments
coverage_details.pattern_matching: Pattern match vertical routes, collision crossers

strategic_intel.primary_weakness: Intermediate zones, 8-15 yard windows, quick slants
strategic_intel.vulnerable_to: Four Verts flood, mesh concepts, quick game underneath
strategic_intel.personnel_mismatch: Only 3 pass rushers vs 5+ protection, QB has time
strategic_intel.run_vulnerability: Light box, only 6 defenders, edges are soft

coaching_keys.defensive_intent: Prevent explosive plays over 20+ yards, force checkdowns
coaching_keys.key_matchup: Slot coverage vs quick game, linebacker depth vs intermediate
coaching_keys.adjustment_needed: Attack intermediate zones, use pick plays, run game
